description: Import metadata columns into the current sample collection.

payloadFields.name: columnarMetadata
payloadFields.description: Metadata encoded in columnar form, aligned to the sample order.

payloadFields.name: attributeDefs
payloadFields.description: Optional attribute definitions for the incoming metadata columns.

payloadFields.name: replace
payloadFields.description: If true, the provided metadata will replace existing metadata instead of being added to them.

description: Create a derived metadata column from a selected or aggregated attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: name
payloadFields.description: Name of the derived metadata column, should be less than 20 characters. The resulting metadata is written under this name.

payloadFields.name: groupPath
payloadFields.description: Optional metadata group path for the derived column.

payloadFields.name: scale
payloadFields.description: Optional scale definition for the derived metadata column.

description: Import metadata columns from an external source.

payloadFields.name: sourceId
payloadFields.description: Optional source identifier. If omitted, source resolution is allowed only when exactly one source exists.

payloadFields.name: columnIds
payloadFields.description: Columns requested from the source.

payloadFields.name: groupPath
payloadFields.description: Optional metadata group path override.

payloadFields.name: replace
payloadFields.description: If true, replace existing metadata instead of merging.

description: Sort samples by a selected attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Keep the first sample for each category in the current ordering.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Keep samples from the first n categories in the current ordering.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: n
payloadFields.description: Number of categories to retain.

description: Filter samples by comparing a selected quantitative attribute to a threshold.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: operator
payloadFields.description: Comparison operator used for thresholding.

payloadFields.name: operand
payloadFields.description: Numeric threshold used in the comparison.

description: Filter samples by matching values in a selected attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: values
payloadFields.description: Discrete values to match.

payloadFields.name: remove
payloadFields.description: If true, matching samples are removed instead of retained.

description: Remove samples missing a selected attribute value.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Group samples by custom categories chosen from a selected attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: groups
payloadFields.description: A record where the keys are group names and the values are arrays of categories or sample ids.

description: Group samples by the distinct values of a selected attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Group samples into quartiles by a selected quantitative attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Group samples by user-defined thresholds on a selected quantitative attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: thresholds
payloadFields.description: Thresholds used to stratify the samples.

description: Remove a sample group by path.

payloadFields.name: path
payloadFields.description: An array of group names that represent the path to the group. The implicit ROOT group is excluded.

description: Keep categories that appear in every current group.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute whose categories must be present in all current groups.

description: Create or update a reactive selection or parameter value, including point selections, interval selections, and genomic-region selections.

payloadFields.name: selector
payloadFields.description: Structured selector for the parameter.

payloadFields.name: value
payloadFields.description: Serialized parameter value.

payloadFields.name: origin
payloadFields.description: Optional datum origin for replayable values.
